report.summary: Day 57 standup v13: Full 6/6 rotation completed since v12. KEY DELTAS — Karak Network + Fluid Protocol guides built (3,200+ words each, interactive calcs), Aerodrome promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (402 slugs), 4 ecosystem pages get OG metadata via server/client split (EigenLayer, Aave, Uniswap, Jito), AerodromeVeCalculator accessibility polished, DeFi Infrastructure Week social campaign drafted (Tue-Sun schedule). Git locks now ~28h stale, FOMC decision TODAY at 2pm ET. 61 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v12 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 402 slugs (+1 vs v12). Aerodrome Finance guide promoted by publish-v6, redeploy 8521rNHQ6 triggered. PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled to 2 items (Karak Network + Fluid Protocol guides from build-v10).

New content this cycle (build-v10): /learn/karak-network-guide (3,200+ words, KarakYieldEstimator.tsx — 7-asset picker, multi-chain restaking, Article+FAQ JSON-LD) AND /learn/fluid-protocol-guide (3,500+ words, FluidCapitalEfficiencyCalc.tsx — TVL bar chart, debt-as-liquidity deep dive, Article+FAQ JSON-LD). Both queued in PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Design-v10 shipped OG metadata fixes for 4 ecosystem pages (EigenLayer, Aave, Uniswap, Jito) via server/client component split + fixed Daily Challenge broken OG image. AerodromeVeCalculator got WCAG touch targets (44px min), focus states, and ARIA labels. 66+ ecosystem pages still need OG metadata.

Community-v11 drafted DeFi Infrastructure Week social campaign: 4-guide spotlight (Aerodrome, cross-chain bridges, interop, DAO governance), FOMC Day live tweet pack (Wed), Thu newsletter with 3 new guide spotlights, DEX model poll (Thu-Fri), Base ecosystem weekend post, and week review Sunday.

Market context: BTC holding $75K+ (6-week high). ETF inflow streak Day 6 ($962.8M). FOMC decision TODAY Mar 18 at 2pm ET — rate hold 100% priced in, dot plot is the key signal. Pectra T-23 (Apr 10). Tax deadline T-28 (Apr 15).
Page coverage: ~299 page.tsx files for 402 slugs (74%). 103 backlog stubs pending scaffold. All 6 API routes healthy. 15+ consecutive Vercel builds today, zero failures.
GSC organic window: Day 18 of 21 indexing window — first measurable organic clicks from Jan/Feb content imminent. No GSC data confirmed yet.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v12
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v12 ✅ — build-v10 + publish-v6 + design-v10 + community-v11 + eod-v10 all ran. Today total: 60 agent reports prior. v13 standup is report #61.

SHIPPED this cycle ✅ — Karak Network guide (3,200+ words + KarakYieldEstimator); Fluid Protocol guide (3,500+ words + FluidCapitalEfficiencyCalc); Aerodrome promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (402); OG metadata on 4 ecosystem pages + Daily Challenge; AerodromeVeCalculator WCAG polish; DeFi Infrastructure Week social campaign drafted; social card created (social-defi-infrastructure-week.svg).

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW ~28 HOURS STALE (created Mar 16 ~11:17/13:06 CET). 402 slugs, ~299 page.tsx, 2 new guides with interactive calcs, OG metadata fixes, all design work — ALL uncommitted. FOMC is TODAY 14:00 ET. This is the single highest-priority action.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 routes — 22nd consecutive standup flagging. FOMC TODAY will spike /api/prices and /api/trending simultaneously. Still 0/6 coverage.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Karak + Fluid) — awaiting next publish cycle promotion.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] API fallback coverage: 2/6 routes only. Four routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields) return HTTP 500 on upstream failure — high risk during FOMC traffic spike.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 66+ ecosystem pages missing OG metadata (need server/client split).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx rename — fixes 40/42 TS errors, non-blocking.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] Vercel Pro trial: ~7 days remaining. Payment method required at vercel.com/account/billing before Mar 25.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION REQUIRED: Remove git locks NOW (2-minute terminal task). Commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add -A → git commit -m 'Day 57: 402 pages, Karak+Fluid+Aerodrome guides, OG metadata fixes, UX polish' → git push. FOMC decision is TODAY at 2pm ET. Without this, production serves a 28-hour-stale HEAD missing 2 new guides, all OG metadata fixes, and all design work.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiters before FOMC spike (next build cycle): Apply checkRateLimit() to all 6 public API routes, prioritizing /api/prices and /api/trending. Add fallback data to 4 missing routes. FOMC will generate concurrent traffic across all routes — unprotected endpoints are a live production risk TODAY.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote Karak + Fluid from PUBLISH_QUEUE + continue ecosystem OG metadata rollout: Next publish cycle promotes both guides to PUBLISHED_PAGES (→ 404 slugs). Design continues server/client split on remaining 66+ ecosystem pages for social sharing readiness. Verify Vercel billing this week.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Content machine running at peak velocity: 3 new DeFi guides this rotation (Karak, Fluid, Aerodrome), 402 published pages, full FOMC Day social campaign ready, DeFi Infrastructure Week scheduled Tue–Sun. The bottleneck remains a 2-minute terminal action blocking all work from reaching production. FOMC day is the highest-traffic catalyst in 6 weeks — every hour of delay reduces the return on 28 hours of accumulated work.
